items.headline: Broadcom (AVGO) and Meta Announce Multi-Year AI Infrastructure Partnership
items.summary: Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ:AVGO) is one of the 12 AI Stocks in Focus on Wall Street: Tesla, Meta, and More. On April 14, Broadcom together with Meta announced a multi-year, multi-generation strategic partnership to support Meta’s artificial intelligence compute infrastructure through at least 2029. This partnership news has landed the stock fifth place on our list […]
